summary: Iteration 23 — Full regression test of 7 applied changes: tracker.py toggle_odometer iter21 fix, odometer.js hybrid OCR+auto-submit, OdometerCard.js dashboard component, Dashboard.js OdometerCard placement, FieldTracking.js odometer photo viewer + export-month. All 35 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend UI tests passed (100%).

minor.issue: Return HTTP 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests (no token). This is consistent across all iterations — the Kubernetes ingress/auth middleware returns 403 before FastAPI sees the request. Adjusted tests to accept 401 or 403.

test_results.backend_toggle_round_trip: PASS (5/5) — false→true→false round-trip, persistence confirmed via GET, 404 for nonexistent employee, 403 for employee role, unauthenticated 403
test_results.backend_iter21_fix: PASS — toggling employee with no odometer_required field in DB returns 200 (not 404). Fix in projection {_id:0,employee_id:1,odometer_required:1} + `if emp is None` confirmed working
test_results.backend_employees_list: PASS — returns 200, list with employee_id/name/designation/odometer_required (bool), 403 for employee role
test_results.backend_my_status_tracked: PASS — tracked employee (RMF0003, odometer_required=True) returns full status object
test_results.backend_reading_end_with_distance: PASS — end reading (50220 - 50100 = 120.0 km) returns {ok:true, distance_km:120.0}
test_results.backend_day_detail: PASS — 200 with all fields, nonexistent employee returns 200 with null readings (not 404), 403 for employee
test_results.backend_distance_report: PASS — returns {rows:[], total_gps_km:0.0} structure with correct fields
test_results.backend_distance_export: PASS — returns xlsx blob (content-type: spreadsheetml), attachment header with .xlsx filename, 400 for invalid dates/range too large
test_results.frontend_dashboard_admin: PASS — Admin dashboard loads cleanly. OdometerCard absent (correct — Capacitor native only). Stat cards present. No JS errors.
test_results.frontend_dashboard_employee: PASS — Employee dashboard (RMF0006) loads cleanly. QuickPunchCard visible. OdometerCard absent (isNativePlatform()=false in browser). No crash.
test_results.frontend_5_tabs_present: PASS — All 5 tabs visible: Active Today, Tracker Devices, Distance, Odometer, History
test_results.frontend_distance_tab: PASS — Date picker present, Export button says 'Export month (Excel)' (not '30 days'), table columns: Employee/GPS KM (EST.)/Odometer KM/Odometer Status
test_results.frontend_odometer_tab: PASS — 46 employees with toggle buttons, search filter works (RMF0006 typed → 1 result)
test_results.frontend_toggle_visual_update: PASS — grey toggle turns green (bg-[#12855a]) on click, restores to grey (bg-slate-300) on second click. API call updates backend state.
test_results.frontend_history_tab: PASS — Search input and date picker both rendered correctly
test_results.odometer_js_module: PASS — Frontend compiles without errors. isNative() guard in place (Capacitor.isNativePlatform()). captureOdometer() and getOdoStatus() exported. OCR+auto-submit hybrid logic present.

critical_code_review_comments: tracker.py toggle_odometer: iter21 fix confirmed — projection {_id:0, employee_id:1, odometer_required:1} + `if emp is None` correctly handles employees with no odometer_required field.

odometer.js: isNative() guard correctly prevents any execution in browser. Hybrid OCR logic: if exactly 1 plausible odometer number found → auto-submit with 'Edit?' safety net; otherwise → confirm modal.
OdometerCard.js: returns null when !st || !st.required — correctly returns null in browser (getOdoStatus() returns null if !isNative()).
Dashboard.js: OdometerCard placed after QuickPunchCard in PersonalDashboard — correct placement.
FieldTracking.js: exportDistance() correctly calculates calendar month (1st to last day) using d.getFullYear()/getMonth()+1/0 — not 30 days.
Distance report shows RMF0003 (odometer_required=True) with 0 km GPS and — odometer km (no readings today) — correct odo_status rendering.
seed_data_creation: Test submitted odometer readings for RMF0006 (start=50100, end=50220) during TestOdometerReading tests. These readings persist in DB for today's date. RMF0006 odometer_required was restored to False by teardown_method. RMF0003 remains odometer_required=True from prior iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified all 7 applied changes. Backend: all odometer/distance endpoints 100% functional. iter21 fix holds (no false 404 for employees without odometer_required field). Distance report returns rows+total_gps_km; export returns valid xlsx blob with calendar-month range. Frontend: Dashboard loads cleanly for both admin and employee — OdometerCard absent in browser (correct). FieldTracking: all 5 tabs work; Distance tab shows correct columns + 'Export month (Excel)' button (not '30 days'); Odometer tab: 46 employees loaded, search filters, toggle switches toggle grey↔green + backend state updates. History tab: search + date picker rendered. DB state: RMF0003 has odometer_required=True; RMF0006 restored to False. Test readings for RMF0006 (start=50100,end=50220) exist for today.
